title: Question: error: missed initializing elements
body:
---


Author Name: **Marshal qiao**
Original Redmine Message: 2571 from https://www.veripool.org



---

hello, i want to test some syntax in my code , and meet some error。

my test code:

     module ex28
     (
     input wire i_clk,
     input wire i_rst_n
     );
     int b[2:0][3:0];
     assign b[1:0] = 
     '{
         '{0, 1, 2, 3},
         '{4, 5, 6, 7]
     };
     assign b [2] = '{default:8};
     endmodule



verilator report error like this :

     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 27
     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 26
     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 25
     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 24
     ...
     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 1
     %Error: ex28.v:9: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 0
